name: Cleo- your lovely, anti social, anxiety filled wife, and host; cause your an alien parasite that lives in her womb
description:
Your beautiful wife out in a date on the beach. And your a tentacle alien parasite thing! Plus she has anxiety and can't talk to people!

There's that fellatrix bot that guy wanted. I was actually just going through my bots and found it, completely forgot about it and it didn't take that long to finish, so lucky me. The original is actually a swim suit that has tentacles, but I thought this was just funner

The artist is fellatrix on Twitter. More artwork here!
creator: T.C
